acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 approved high-PD LoC sources are integrated and documented with rationale.
At least 5000 cleared items are emitted to the fan-out contract, each with a complete frozen provenance manifest.
100% of cleared items pass the CI provenance-completeness gate.
A fresh stratified independent rights audit (at least 200 sampled items, by rights category and source) shows zero confirmed wrong-clears.
All access remained within loc-policy.yml limits; zero policy breaches.
The quarantine ledger is updated with all non-cleared items from the new sources.
context: M3 requires at least 5000 cleared items across at least 2 approved sources with 100% provenance and zero confirmed wrong-clears in a fresh audit. A second source beyond Chronicling America is identified and approved, both are run through the gate, and a fresh stratified audit is conducted. Depends on adapter-001 and rights-001. See PLAN.md (M3 exit criterion c, Success metrics).
objective: Scale the cleared corpus to at least 5000 items by integrating at least 2 approved high-PD LoC sources, maintaining 100% provenance on every cleared item, and passing a fresh stratified independent rights audit with zero confirmed wrong-clears.
output: An expanded cleared corpus with at least 5000 items and 100% provenance, plus a fresh rights audit report with zero confirmed wrong-clears.
title: Scale cleared corpus to at least 5000 items across at least 2 approved sources (100% provenance)
